last_action: Finalized run 1 with 30 validated hotels ranked by published total guest-room count; rejected 10 below-cutoff controls.
next_action: Keep the finalized data-only run unchanged unless an operator requests a new ingestion run or later authorizes UI work.

quality.note: The final cutoff is 1,084 rooms. Required names, addresses, and coordinates are sourced; optional nightly prices remain null because no comparable stay-date, occupancy, tax-basis, and observation-date rate sample was collected.
